MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Wyendel Davis
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Damion Ederson, is present.
Attorney, Thomas Loran , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Ulmer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-29-2010 is vacated.
